rationale: the principal reviewer satisfied the exact model, reasoning and schema contract and found no blocker
the independent reviewer completed on the same decision card, used the exact identity, returned PASS and found no blocker
all six Fable entries are explicitly residual risks, not blocking findings, and concern already-disclosed sample size, source overlap, reviewer error, precision granularity and HOLD classification
the unpreregistered design-review maxItems=3 presentation bound has no bearing on gold support, planner scoring or GO derivation
the raw independent response remains preserved; it is not truncated, repaired or reissued
residual_risks_carried_forward: two questions provide only a narrow mechanism decision, not an effect estimate
official-source overlap prevents unseen-source generalization claims
semantic novelty and alternative-path completeness retain ordinary reviewer-error risk
selected-unit precision is coarse at this cohort size; full support recall and question completeness are the primary gates
provider incompleteness must remain HOLD and semantic failure must remain NO-GO
